revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

'''3-2-150

Compressed-air (diaphragm) horn

A fog signalling apparatus comprising a resonant horn excited at its throat by impulsive emissions of compressed air regulated by an elastic diaphragm.

{{IALAFooter}}

{{languages|Compressed-air diaphragm horn}}
